title: callicarpa selleana
intro: Callicarpa selleana, also known as the Purple Fruit Plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Callicarpa selleana include the treatment of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Callicarpa selleana is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its leaves and fruits are used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
